title: Amazon-Globalstar Deal Is Poised to Boost Apple’s Satellite Ambitions
description: Amazon.com Inc.’s takeover of Globalstar Inc. is poised to benefit one of the company’s biggest rivals in hardware devices: Apple Inc.

title: Meta, Broadcom Deepen Ties on Chips; Tan Departs Meta Board
description: Meta Platforms Inc. announced an expanded multibillion-dollar partnership with Broadcom Inc. to design and build custom chips to power the social media giant’s artificial intelligence efforts.

title: Nemetschek to Buy Thoma Bravo’s HCSS in €2 Billion-Plus Deal
description: Nemetschek SE agreed to acquire construction management software provider Heavy Construction Systems Specialists from Thoma Bravo.
